summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Acuity Team Hub monday.com clone. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: 12/15 features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Comment submit button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay at bottom-right corner
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True in Playwright bypasses the issue, but real users may have difficulty clicking

integration_issues.issue: Invite Members button only visible to admin users. New users joining existing team are not admins.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - first user to select company becomes admin

issues: Comment submit button positioned too close to 'Made with Emergent' badge causing click interception

action_items: Consider adding z-index or repositioning comment submit button to avoid overlap with Emergent badge
All core features are working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Team admin logic works as expected (first user becomes admin)
seed_data_creation: Created test users, team members, boards, groups, items, and comments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. Frontend has minor overlay issue with comment submit button. Team invite functionality works but requires admin privileges. Test user admin_75257@acuity.com exists with password Test1234.

passed: Login with registered user -> redirects to /workspaces
Team page shows member count stats (Active, Invited, Total, Removed)
Comment icon opens Item Detail Dialog
Comment input and submit button exist
partial: Team invite dialog -> works for admin users only (expected behavior)
Comment submission -> works with force click, may have overlay issue for users
not_tested: Pending Invitations section visibility after invite (dialog overlay blocked further testing)
